sanierung.title: Product Finder
sanierung.subtitle: The right KORODUR solution in 3 steps.

loesungsfinder.page_subtitle: Describe your situation and we will show you matching products and reference projects.
loesungsfinder.meta_description: Find the right renovation solution for your industrial floor in 4 steps.
loesungsfinder.step1_question: How large is the area to be renovated?
loesungsfinder.step1_subline: Size determines the product range – small repairs call for fast-setting mortars, large areas for an industrial screed.
loesungsfinder.step1_punktuell_beschreibung: Individual damaged spots, stairs, walls, joint profiles
loesungsfinder.step1_mittel_beschreibung: Connected hall sections, individual rooms, smaller loading zones
loesungsfinder.step1_gross_beschreibung: Complete halls, large outdoor areas, parking decks, production facilities
loesungsfinder.step2_subline: For outdoor areas, freeze-thaw and de-icing salt resistance are essential – we factor that in directly.
loesungsfinder.step2_innen_beschreibung: Halls, workshops, production, warehouses, retail spaces
loesungsfinder.step2_aussen_beschreibung: Parking decks, loading zones, ramps, outdoor storage – exposed to frost and de-icing salt
loesungsfinder.step3_question: In which industry will the floor be used?
loesungsfinder.step3_subline_innen: From your industry we derive the typical loads – forklift traffic, chemicals, hygiene or appearance directly influence the product choice.
loesungsfinder.step3_subline_aussen: Outdoor areas differ greatly between car traffic, heavy loads and pure weathering exposure – the industry determines the requirement profile.
loesungsfinder.step4_question: When does the area need to be back in service?
loesungsfinder.step4_subline: For very short time windows we recommend Rapid Set products – this changes the recommendation significantly.
loesungsfinder.step4_sehrkurz_beschreibung: Renovation during ongoing operation, back in service within 24 h
loesungsfinder.step4_kurz_beschreibung: Planned production break, short shutdown with a clear window
loesungsfinder.step4_planbar_beschreibung: Full industrial screed build-up with standard curing possible
loesungsfinder.ergebnis_empty_text: We currently have no perfect product match for this combination. Contact us directly – we will find a suitable solution.
loesungsfinder.refs_gelockert: No exact match for your project? We show related projects here and are happy to advise you individually.
loesungsfinder.refs_keine: We do not yet have published references for this selection. We are continuously expanding our database.
loesungsfinder.cta_text: We discuss your project and match the right product to your job site.

microtop.title: KORODUR Micro-Top
microtop.subtitle: Mineral Drinking Water Tank Renovation
microtop.description: Purely mineral coating system according to DVGW W 300 – for drinking water tanks, elevated reservoirs and water towers. No polymer additives, DVGW-certified, microsilica-enhanced.

anwendungsmatrix.h1: Which products fit your renovation needs?
anwendungsmatrix.cta_text: Not sure? The solution finder guides you in a few steps to the right solution – or talk directly to our advisors.
anwendungsmatrix.meta_description: Application matrix for KORODUR renovation products: use cases such as industrial floors, parking decks, traffic areas, water protection, decorative floors and repairs, with technical data and data sheets.

bereiche.keine_produkte: The product data for this area is currently being prepared for the new website. Please feel free to contact us directly.
bereiche.cta_text: Our technical consultants support you with product selection and planning.
bereiche.haendler_hinweis: Rapid Set products are available exclusively through builders' merchants, and abroad through our distribution partners. For information on suppliers in your region, call +49 9621 4759-0.
bereiche.industrieboden_teaser: Hard aggregate screeds and dry-shake toppings for the highest loads
bereiche.industrieboden_intro: The industrial floor is one of the most heavily stressed components of any industrial building. Our KORODUR hard aggregates and NEODUR dry mortars have proven themselves for decades, even under extreme loads: more than 750 million m² of installed flooring are the best reference. Suitable for all industrial sectors, indoors and outdoors.
bereiche.sichtestrich_teaser: Decorative cementitious floors: GRANIDUR, COPETTI FLOOR, TRUazzo
bereiche.sichtestrich_intro: The mineral industrial floor as a decorative screed: cementitious, robust, creative and elegant. Every KORODUR decorative screed is a handcrafted one-off, combining durability, aesthetics and sustainability. Installation is carried out exclusively by certified specialist companies.
bereiche.schnellbetonsysteme_teaser: Rapid Set Concrete and KOROCRETE for minimum downtime
bereiche.schnellbetonsysteme_intro: For time-optimised repairs of infrastructure and industrial facilities we offer tailor-made rapid concrete solutions: from overnight runway repairs to the refurbishment of production and warehouse floors. We support you from defining the concrete mix design to producing the concrete directly on site.
bereiche.rapid-set_teaser: Rapid repair mortars, load-bearing after one hour
bereiche.rapid-set_intro: Proven in the USA for 50 years and available in Europe exclusively through us: Rapid Set cement technology. Repair mortars for floors, walls and ceilings, indoors and outdoors, with freely selectable consistency and load-bearing after one hour.
bereiche.spezialbaustoffe_teaser: Grouting mortars, anchor mortars and concrete repair
bereiche.spezialbaustoffe_intro: Mineral factory-made dry mortars for assembly and precast construction, mining and tunnelling, concrete repair, grouting and anchoring. Controlled factory quality: simply mix with water on site.
bereiche.3d-concrete-printing_intro: We advance 3D concrete printing technology to enable sustainable and affordable construction worldwide. Together with our partner CyBe, we support customers in every phase of the process, from material technology to implementation.
bereiche.microtop_teaser: Spray mortars for drinking water reservoirs to DVGW standards
bereiche.microtop_intro: With the MICROTOP product line we have developed a complete mineral system for the refurbishment and new construction of drinking water reservoirs: coordinated, microsilica-modified spray mortars for every work step, from pre-spraying through the main coating to surface finishing. The products are approved to DVGW worksheets W 300 and W 347 (tested by the Hygiene Institute Gelsenkirchen) and purely mineral: no plastics in drinking water. Utility companies worldwide rely on MICROTOP, from 75,000 m³ reservoirs to water towers.
bereiche.katzenstreu_teaser: Bentonite hygiene litter for retail and private label
bereiche.katzenstreu_intro: Since 1992 we have been producing and distributing bentonite cat litter for European customers: food retailers, discounters and pet supply wholesalers, also as private label. All products are purely natural, free of chemical additives and certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and BRC Global Standard. Get in touch with us.
bereiche.katzenstreu_trust: Produced to ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and BRC Global Standard. All products are pure natural products, untreated and guaranteed asbestos-free.
bereiche.katzenstreu_privatelabel_text: We also produce bentonite cat litter as private label for retail brands: premium grades in 5, 6 and 8 l, standard grades in 5, 10 and 20 kg, special sizes on request, optionally with fresh scent. Delivered in environmentally friendly paper packaging (FSC MIX).

unternehmen.title: About KORODUR
unternehmen.intro1: Since 1936 we have specialised in producing mineral hard aggregates for heavy-duty cementitious industrial floors. More than 750 million m² of KORODUR industrial floors have been installed worldwide. Today we maintain business relationships with more than 40 countries.
unternehmen.intro2: Founded in Berlin in 1936, owned by the Heckmann family since 1969 and headquartered in Amberg since 1978: we act in the spirit of consistency, credibility and continuity. Production takes place at our Bochum-Wattenscheid plant.
unternehmen.nachhaltigkeit_text: Hard aggregate industrial floors are extremely durable and reduce the life cycle costs of a building. With product developments such as NEODUR HE 3 green, we reduce CO₂ emissions in production by up to 30%. We are certified to DIN EN ISO 9001:2015 and a member of the DGNB.
unternehmen.cta_title: Would you like to learn more about us?
unternehmen.geschichte_intro: The anvil in our company logo has symbolised the properties of KORODUR floors since the company was founded in 1936.

meilensteine.text: KORODUR Westphal Hartbeton GmbH & Co. KG founded in Berlin by Werner Westphal
The KORODUR group passes to the Heckmann family
KORODUR International GmbH founded to build an international distribution network
Headquarters relocated from Berlin to Amberg, Bavaria
Bentonite hygiene litter business unit established
KORODUR ENGINEERING (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD founded for special projects in Southeast Asia

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.intro: Talk directly to our technical consultants: about products, projects or suppliers.
kontakt.form_intro: Write to us: we will get back to you as soon as possible.
kontakt.form_hinweis: Sending opens your email client with the prepared message to info@korodur.de.
kontakt.fachberater_intro: Our technical consultants help with product questions, quantity calculations and application advice, free of charge and without obligation.
kontakt.international_text: KORODUR has an international sales network and works with local representatives, distribution partners and applicators. All products are supplied from our plants in Germany. Please contact our export department for advice and further information.

rechtliches.sprachhinweis: This legal information is provided in German; the German version is legally binding.
